title: Origins: Kitsune
description: You are one of the ancient fox spirits, both respected and feared by many. What will you do with your heritage, and the power it brings?
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

[For Other translation, click here.](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/origins-kitsune)
[![https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/origins-kitsune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/065f0c24a688dd3a68b09d97530dcabc48a444fa_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/origins-kitsune)

# Kitsune

**You are one of the ancient fox spirits, both respected and feared by many. What will you do with your heritage, and the power it brings?**

> There have Normal version and white version of **Kitsune**
## Passives

- 💨Swifty mobility
  - You run 40% faster, and jump 3 block higher when sneaking. You take no fall damage.
- 🤫Sneaky
  - Sculk Sensor won't detect you from landing, walking and running.
- 🍒Favorite Food
  - Berries are more saturation on you.
- 📜Ancient Spirits
  - You have Particles around you when moving.
- 📜Ancient Lives
  - You have 30% less health.
##
- This origin can be also found in [Omnix Origin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-omnixomnitrix)
- Any question can ask in the discord server ::: )
- [Michael Ten Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/KuWNd8av4q )
